title: agropyron intermedium subsp. glaucum
intro: Agropyron intermedium subsp. glaucum, also known as blue wheatgrass or glaucous wheatgrass, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress, and promote overall health. The health benefits of Agropyron intermedium subsp. glaucum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas, tonics, or added to salves and creams for topical application.
